data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Extend Knots profile/workflow descriptors to retain queue_states, action_states, queue_actions, and per-state owners from Loom/Knots profile metadata.
2. Make runtime claimability derive from `state in queue_states` and `owners.states[state].kind`, with no hardcoded state-name inference on the Knots path.
3. Update Knots backend filtering/mapping tests to cover a custom `evaluate` profile (`ready_to_evaluate` -> `evaluating`).
4. Run lint, typecheck, unit tests, and build in `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-custom-workflow-claimability`.
